acceptance_criteria.text: Template_3 XLSX scene_description includes transcript rows whose interval overlaps the segment window, matching HTML.
proof: _segment_rows() now uses interval overlap when a transcript end or duration column exists.
raw/test-unit.txt proves a 0.8-1.2 transcript row appears in both 0-1 and 1-2 segment rows.
raw/test-integration.txt proves the generated workbook has the same value in 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C4 and C5.

acceptance_criteria.text: Rows starting before a segment but ending inside or after the segment are included; boundary-crossing words may appear in adjacent XLSX rows like HTML.
Existing display text-column selection is preserved, including Russian/source original_text behavior.
proof: Integration input used target_language=en with text=look and original_text=смотри; XLSX cells used original_text.

acceptance_criteria.text: If end or duration is unavailable, fallback to previous start-based behavior.
proof: raw/test-unit.txt and raw/test-integration.txt prove start-only transcripts are included only in the row containing their start timestamp.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove syntax, overlap selection, generated workbook values, and diff hygiene.
proof: Synthetic Template_3 workbook generation check passed.
git diff --check passed; it emitted only a line-ending warning from git.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Run the unit _segment_rows() overlap/fallback snippet recorded in raw/test-unit.txt.
Run the synthetic Template_3 workbook generation snippet recorded in raw/test-integration.txt.
known_gaps: Existing .xlsx files are not modified; reports must be regenerated.
The HTML report was not changed because the task was to make XLSX match existing HTML overlap behavior.
